name: prompt-optimizer
description: Optimizes raw developer prompts using native AI models.

chatParticipants.name: promptir
chatParticipants.description: Optimize raw coding prompts with active editor context.

commands.name: optimize
commands.description: Optimize a raw prompt using the active editor context.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Prepare a bug-review prompt using the active editor context.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Prepare an explanation prompt for the active file or selection.

commands.name: problems
commands.description: Prepare a prompt focused on current VS Code Problems diagnostics.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Prepare a planning-only prompt without asking for code edits.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
